description: These slip-on heels from catwalk are given a fresh twist with black fabric and black leather-look fabric. The simple design is perfect for evening wear and versatile enough to be teamed with dresses and jeans.UpperBlack synthetic patent leather toe straps for comfort and styleElasticated fabric band on the ankle for a snug FitCollar strap for added comfortSoft leather lining for added comfortFabric covered footbed in an ergonomic design for extra comfort and added styleOutsoleTPU outsole with heelTextured design on the forefoot and heel for added comfortSandal CareWipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dustDo not use a drier or store in direct sunlight
